description: The Thief-Acrobat is a thief who transitions to acrobatic abilities starting at a certain level. The character begins as a thief and gains acrobatic abilities in addition to (or replacing) some thief abilities.
transition_note: A thief who meets the STR and DEX requirements may elect to become a thief-acrobat at 6th level. The character retains thief abilities at their 5th level values (or lower) and begins gaining acrobatic abilities.

thief_abilities_frozen.description: Thief abilities are frozen at the values attained at 5th level thief when the transition occurs.

acrobatic_abilities.description: Acrobatic abilities gained after the transition. Values are percentages.

ability_descriptions.tightrope_walking: Can walk along narrow surfaces (ropes, ledges) without falling.
ability_descriptions.pole_vaulting: Distance that can be vaulted using a pole (horizontal or vertical).
ability_descriptions.high_jumping: Maximum height that can be reached with a standing jump.
ability_descriptions.running_broad_jump: Distance jumped from a running start.
ability_descriptions.tumbling_attack: Chance of gaining +2 to hit and +1 damage by tumbling into an attack.
ability_descriptions.tumbling_evasion: Chance of avoiding all damage from an area effect attack (breath weapon, fireball, etc.).
ability_descriptions.tumbling_falling: Percentage of falling damage negated through acrobatic landing.
ability_descriptions.acrobatic_climbing: Replaces the thief climb walls ability with an improved version.

improved_ac.description: Thief-Acrobats gain an AC bonus when unencumbered and wearing light armor: -2 AC bonus at 6th level, improving by -1 per 3 levels.

evasion.description: By tumbling, the thief-acrobat can attempt to completely avoid damage from area effects.
